data.title: 国际服签到礼物「The Operation Team's Appreciation Gift!」
data.summary: [Operation Team's Appreciation Gifts!] Sensei, we hope you enjoy a more bountiful Fall than ever bef
data.body:
[Operation Team's Appreciation Gifts!]

Sensei, we hope you enjoy a more bountiful Fall than ever before—
So we’ve prepared plenty of special gifts for you! 🎁

Log in every day during the following period and make sure to claim all your rewards~

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3163007

#BlueArchive
